content:
1. Converts between °C/°F/K with abs-zero guard on output; provides reusable, validated unit conversion.
2. The abs-zero test only runs for Kelvin targets; inputs are never validated; round( ,2) is unconditional.
3. Proper placement/scope of the absolute-zero check (author only guarded Kelvin output).
4. Input < 0 K, Celsius/Fahrenheit results below −273.15, floating-point edge values, and non-rounding needs.

(The last two answers are inferred from visible gaps; author intent is not explicit.)
